---
title: "ConnectionLayer.tsx"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/vis/components/ConnectionLayer.tsx"
loc: 94
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.05
style_score: 4.01
intel_score: 6.68
overall_score: 5.60
---

## Intent
React component rendering ConnectionLayer.

## Interaction Protocol
Include <ConnectionLayer /> within a React-Three-Fiber Canvas context.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useMemo](file://react)
- [useRef](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [Line](file://@react-three/drei)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)
- [Link](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `NeuralLink`
- `lineRef`
- `ConnectionLayer`
- `ConnectionLayer`
- `validLinks`
- `useMemo`
- `bgPoints`
- `hl`
- `sNode`
- `tNode`
- `isHighlighted`
- `geo`
- `sNode`
- `tNode`
